name: Marketing Channel Budget
context: Allocate budget SHARE across 22 channel x audience/geo options to balance four conflicting goals: direct Conversions, audience Reach, ROAS, and Brand Lift. Efficient direct-response channels (search, email, retargeting, affiliate) convert well and return high ROAS but reach few people and barely move brand; broad upper-funnel channels (CTV, YouTube, display, podcast, OOH) reach huge audiences and build brand but convert poorly. Reach uses quadratic aggregation: same-audience channels overlap, so stacking them yields diminishing combined reach (audience-overlap interaction matrix in scores.json). Options, scores, and the matrix are in scores.json.

scenarios.name: ios_privacy
scenarios.description: Signal loss from app-tracking changes cuts measured conversions on social/programmatic by ~20%.
